Tutorials

Step-by-step guides to set up and use AI tools. Practical, tested, beginner-friendly.

Create Professional AI Videos with HeyGen — No Camera Required

Learn how to use HeyGen to create talking-head videos with AI avatars, translate content into 175+ languages, and scale your video marketing without a studio.

HeyGen Beginner ⏱️ 25 minutes

Automate Your Email with Lindy AI in 15 Minutes

Set up Lindy AI to triage your inbox, draft replies, and schedule meetings automatically. A practical step-by-step tutorial.

Lindy AI Beginner ⏱️ 15 minutes

Build Your First AI Workflow with n8n (No Code)

n8n is the open-source Zapier alternative with native AI support. Here's how to build an automated lead processing workflow from scratch.

n8n Intermediate ⏱️ 45 minutes

How to Set Up OpenClaw: Complete Beginner's Guide

OpenClaw went viral in 2026. Here's how to install it, connect your tools, and run your first AI agent — no coding required.

OpenClaw Beginner ⏱️ 30 minutes
